overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a wooden riverside dock at sunset, then turning and proceeding into a forested area with ancient stone ruins. The clip features golden hour lighting transitioning to dappled forest shade as the character moves from the open waterfront into the wooded trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock on calm river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the river, approaching the stone tower ruins visible across the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow pier extending over the water
calm reflective water surface showing golden sunset reflections
tall crumbling stone tower and castle ruins on the distant shore
massive gnarled tree with sprawling branches growing among the ruins
bright golden sun low on the horizon creating warm backlighting
large canvas sack tied with rope sitting on the dock planks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock extending over a calm river during golden hour. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting warm light across the water toward ancient stone ruins and a massive tree on the distant shore. A supply sack rests on the dock to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of dock with panoramic river view

events.description: character reaches the end of the dock and turns to face the river and surrounding landscape
character turns back toward land and begins walking off the dock

agents.ego_description: pausing at the end of the dock to survey the river and ruins, then turning to walk back toward the forested shore

entered.detail: dense line of trees marking the edge of the forest along the shore
vertical wooden mooring post at the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: At the end of the dock, the character pauses to observe the panoramic view of the river and distant ruins before turning back toward land. The forest tree line becomes visible on the right as the character prepares to leave the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with ancient stone ruins

events.description: character steps off the wooden dock onto the dirt forest path, entering the wooded area
lighting becomes darker and more diffused as character moves deeper under the forest canopy

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding forest trail away from the river, navigating through dense vegetation and past ancient stone structures

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail covered with grass and fallen leaves
crumbling stone wall sections overtaken by vegetation
tall deciduous trees forming a dense canopy overhead
standalone stone pillars and broken columns from ancient structures
red and purple wildflowers growing along the path edges

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, the character enters a dense forest trail with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. Ancient stone ruins and pillars appear among the trees as the path winds deeper into the woods, with wildflowers lining the dirt trail and the river now visible only as a distant glimmer through the foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, sun-drenched waterfront into the shaded depths of an ancient forest. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden dock over a calm river, where the low golden hour sun illuminates distant stone ruins and a massive tree on the far shore. As the character reaches the end of the dock, the camera pauses to take in the panoramic river view before turning away from the water toward the encroaching tree line. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the dock and enters a dense forest trail, where the warm open light transforms into dappled sunlight filtering through a thick canopy. Finally, the path winds deeper into the woods past wildflowers and weathered stone pillars, leaving the river as a distant glimmer through the foliage.
